user_metadata.description: Optionally provide a collection of key value annotations describing this resource.

display_name.ui:description: Enter a brief name, label or title for this resource.

name.ui:description: Enter the name of the organisation.

user_metadata.title: Custom User Metadata
user_metadata.description: Optionally provide a collection of key value annotations describing this resource.

display_name.ui:description: Enter a display name for this person.

first_name.ui:description: What is this person's first name?

last_name.ui:description: What is this person's last name?

email.ui:description: What is this person's email address?

orcid.ui:description: Optionally provide an ORCID using the search tool below.

ethics_approved.ui:description: Have you received consent and been granted permission from the person to be registered in the registry?

user_metadata.title: Custom User Metadata
user_metadata.description: Optionally provide a collection of key value annotations describing this resource.

display_name.ui:description: Enter a brief name, label or title for this resource.

name.ui:description: Enter a name for the software model.

description.ui:description: Provide a description of the model. You can include as much detail as required.

documentation_url.ui:description: Provide a fully qualified URL (e.g. include https) to the site which hosts documentation about the model.

source_url.ui:description: Provide a fully qualified URL (e.g. include https) to the site which hosts the source code for this model.

user_metadata.title: Custom User Metadata
user_metadata.description: Optionally provide a collection of key value annotations describing this resource.

display_name.ui:description: Enter a brief name, label or title for this resource.

software_id.ui:description: Select a registered model from the search tool below.

input_templates.ui:title: Input Dataset Templates
input_templates.ui:description: Provide a list of the model's expected inputs.

template_id.ui:description: Use the search tool below to select a registered dataset template.

optional.ui:description: Tick this box if the dataset template is optional.

output_templates.ui:title: Output Dataset Templates
output_templates.ui:description: Provide a list of the model's expected outputs.

template_id.ui:description: Use the search tool below to select a registered dataset template.

optional.ui:description: Tick this box if the dataset template is optional.

annotations.ui:title: Model Run Annotations
annotations.ui:description: If you would like model runs to require or optionally provide additional user defined annotations, you can include them here. These annotations will be searchable.

required.ui:title: Required annotations
required.ui:description: These annotations must have a value for every model run.

optional.ui:title: Optional annotations
optional.ui:description: These annotations are optional - they can be provided but are not required for every model run.

user_metadata.title: Custom User Metadata
user_metadata.description: Optionally provide a collection of key value annotations describing this resource.

display_name.ui:description: Enter a brief name, label or title for this resource.

description.ui:description: Enter a description about the dataset template. Please include any contextual information about the expected contents of conforming datasets.

defined_resources.ui:description: Defined resources have a known and consistent file path. E.g. dataset A should contain 'parameters.csv' at path 'inputs/parameters.csv'.

path.ui:description: Provide the relative file path to the resource. E.g. 'inputs/parameters.csv'.

description.ui:description: Provide a description of the defined resource.

optional.ui:description: Is this resource optional? By default, it is required.

usage_type.ui:description: What kind of resource is this? How is it being used? Select from the options.

is_folder.ui:title: Folder or file?
is_folder.ui:description: By default, resources are files. If you would like to specify a folder instead, use this option.

additional_metadata.ui:description: You can optionally provide additional annotations to this record.

deferred_resources.ui:description: Deferred resources have a file path which is unknown until model run time, or is variable between model runs. Deferred resources are uniquely identified by a key. E.g. dataset A should contain a parameter file with a name determined at model run time e.g. resource with key 'parameters' at path 'inputs/parameter_file378.txt'.

key.ui:description: Provide a unique (within this record) key for this resource.

description.ui:description: Provide a description of the deferred resource.

optional.ui:description: Is this resource optional? By default, it is required.

usage_type.ui:description: What kind of resource is this? How is it being used? Select from the options.

is_folder.ui:title: Folder or file?
is_folder.ui:description: By default, resources are files. If you would like to specify a folder instead, use this option.

additional_metadata.ui:description: You can optionally provide additional annotations to this record.

user_metadata.title: Custom User Metadata
user_metadata.description: Optionally provide a collection of key value annotations describing this resource.

CollectionFormatAssociations.title: Dataset Associations
CollectionFormatAssociations.description: Please provide information about the people and organisations related to this dataset.

organisation_id.title: Record Creator Organisation
organisation_id.description: Please select the organisation on behalf of which you are registering this data.

data_custodian_id.title: Dataset Custodian
data_custodian_id.description: Please select the Registered Person who is the dataset custodian.

point_of_contact.title: Point of Contact
point_of_contact.description: Please provide a point of contact for enquiries about this data e.g. email address. Please ensure you have sought consent to include these details in the record.

DatasetEthicsRegistrationCheck.title: Dataset Registration Ethics and Privacy
DatasetEthicsRegistrationCheck.description: Does this dataset include any human data or require ethics/privacy approval for its registration? If so, have you included any required ethics approvals, consent from the participants and/or appropriate permissions to register this dataset in this information system?

DatasetEthicsAccessCheck.title: Dataset Access Ethics and Privacy
DatasetEthicsAccessCheck.description: Does this dataset include any human data or require ethics/privacy approval for enabling its access by users of the information system? If so, have you included any required consent from the participants and/or appropriate permissions to facilitate access to this dataset in this information system?

IndigenousKnowledgeCheck.title: Indigenous Knowledge and Consent
IndigenousKnowledgeCheck.description: Does this dataset contain Indigenous Knowledge? If so, do you have consent from the relevant Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander communities for its use and access via this data store?

ExportControls.title: Export Controls
ExportControls.description: Is this dataset subject to any export controls permits? If so, has this dataset cleared any required due diligence checks and have you obtained any required permits?

CollectionFormatApprovals.title: Dataset Approvals
CollectionFormatApprovals.description: Please ensure that the following approvals are considered. Your dataset may not be fit for inclusion in the Data Store if it does not meet the following requirements.

AccessInfo.title: Access Info
AccessInfo.description: Please specify whether data is going to be stored in the Data Store, or referenced from an existing, externally hosted, source.

reposited.title: Data Storage
reposited.description: Is the data going to be stored in the Data Store?

uri.title: Dataset URI
uri.description: Provide the best URI of the externally hosted data.

description.title: Access Description
description.description: Provide information about how to access the externally hosted data, or other relevant notes.

CreatedDate.title: Dataset Creation Date
CreatedDate.description: Has the dataset been created? If so, please provide the date on which this version of the dataset was produced or generated.

PublishedDate.title: Dataset Publication Date
PublishedDate.description: Has the dataset been published? If so, please provide the date on which this version of the dataset was first published.

CollectionFormatSpatialInfo.title: Dataset Spatial Information
CollectionFormatSpatialInfo.description: If your dataset includes spatial data, you can indicate the coverage, resolution and extent of this spatial data.

coverage.title: Spatial Coverage
coverage.description: The geographic area applicable to the data asset. Please specify spatial coverage using the EWKT format.

resolution.title: Spatial Resolution
resolution.description: The spatial resolution applicable to the data asset. Please use the Decimal Degrees standard.

extent.title: Spatial Extent
extent.description: The range of spatial coordinates applicable to the data asset. Please provide a bounding box extent using the EWKT format.

TemporalDurationInfo.title: Temporal Duration
TemporalDurationInfo.description: You can specify the duration of temporal coverage by including both start and end date.

begin_date.title: Start Date
begin_date.description: Please provide the start date of the dataset's temporal coverage.

end_date.title: End Date
end_date.description: Please provide the end date of the dataset's temporal coverage.

CollectionFormatTemporalInfo.title: Dataset Temporal Information
CollectionFormatTemporalInfo.description: If your dataset provides data over a specified time period, you can include the duration and resolution of this temporal coverage.

resolution.title: Temporal Resolution
resolution.description: The temporal resolution (i.e. time step) of the data. Please use the [ISO8601 duration format](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Durations) e.g. "P1Y2M10DT2H30M".

CollectionFormatDatasetInfo.title: Dataset Information
CollectionFormatDatasetInfo.description: Please provide information about this dataset, including the name, description, creation date and publisher information.

name.title: Dataset name
name.description: Please provide a readable name for the dataset.

description.title: Description
description.description: Please provide a more detailed description of the dataset. This should include the nature of the data, the intended usage, and any other relevant information.

publisher_id.title: Publisher
publisher_id.description: Please provide information about the organisation which is publishing or producing this dataset. If this is your organisation, please select it again using the tool below.

license.title: Usage license
license.description: Please select a standard license for usage, by default it will be 'Copyright'.

purpose.title: Dataset Purpose
purpose.description: A brief description of the reason a data asset was created. Should be a good guide to the potential usefulness of a data asset to other users.

rights_holder.title: Dataset Rights Holder
rights_holder.description: Specify the party owning or managing rights over the resource. Please ensure you have sought consent to include these details in the record.

usage_limitations.title: Usage Limitations
usage_limitations.description: A statement that provides information on any caveats or restrictions on access or on the use of the data asset, including legal, security, privacy, commercial or other limitations.

preferred_citation.title: Preferred dataset citation
preferred_citation.description: If you would like to specify how this dataset should be cited, please use the checkbox below to indicate this preference, and enter your preferred citation in the text box.

formats.title: Dataset File Formats
formats.description: What file formats are present in this dataset? E.g. "pdf", "csv" etc.

keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: Provide a list of keywords which describe your dataset [Optional].

user_metadata.title: Custom User Metadata
user_metadata.description: Optionally provide a collection of key value annotations for this dataset.
